name: Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the poached chicken into diagonal slices or chunks and place in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Add green onions and dried basil to the chicken.
3. In another bowl, mix together low-fat yogurt, tomato paste, capers, and season with pepper to taste.
4. Trim tough stems from watercress and chop about 1/4 of the bunch. Mix with the chicken and yogurt sauce.
5. Serve over romaine lettuce leaves and garnish with remaining watercress.
6. Serve with pita bread toasts and tomato slices.
